title: More TNT
description: Adds 16 Fun New Variants of TNT!
body: **More TNT** --- This Datapack adds 16 fun new variants to TNT! All of them can be crafted in a crafting table, or if you have cheats enabled, you can type "*/function mb_tnt:give_all*" to recieve all TNT's. This datapack was created on 1.19.4, and is the only supported version, however lower versions may be functional. This datapack uses a **required** resource pack to play, which you can find in the downloads. Below is a list of all the TNT varieties as well as their crafting recipes. If you have any trouble, issues, or suggestions, you can let me know on my discord. TNT Varieties: --- ***Instant TNT:*** Instant TNT will explode as soon as it is lit, it has no fuse time. ![Instant TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100123176010268692/instant.png) ***Meteor Shower TNT:*** When it is lit, Meteor Shower TNT will summon meteorites to rain down from above, dealing damage to the landscape. ![Meteor Shower TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100123205911465984/meteor.png) ***Creeper TNT:*** When it explodes, Creeper TNT will shoot out four ignited creepers in all directions. ![Creeper TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100123220511826032/creeper.png) ***Forest TNT:*** Forest TNT will spawn eight fancy oak trees around it when it esplodes. ![Forest TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100123227264667658/forest.png) ***Random TNT:*** Random TNT has an unknown fuse timer. It can range anywhere from instant, the thirty seconds. ![Random TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100129196803633242/random.png) ***Pink Sheep TNT:*** When exploded, Pink Sheep TNT will shoot out 8 pink sheep. ![Pink Sheep TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100129213006233611/sheep.png) ***Lightning TNT:*** On detonation, Lightning TNT will summon 5 Lightning Bolts. ![Lightning TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100129232283254895/lightning.png) ***Confetti TNT:*** Confetti TNT summons a bunch of confetti particles when it explodes. ![Confetti TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100129253179269170/confetti.png) ***Smoke Bomb:*** When it explodes, the smoke bomb will summon a bunch of black particles, and make every entity near it invisible for 15 seconds. ![Smoke Bomb](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100133107232948355/smoke.png) ***Arrow TNT:*** Arrow TNT will shoot a barrage of arrows up into the sky. ![Arrow TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100133127109759087/arrow.png) ***Rotten TNT:*** This will give all near entities hunger and nasuea. ![Rotten TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100133147259174963/rotten.png) ***Winter TNT:*** This will make a patch of Snow, a Spruce Tree, and spawn a Snowman. ![Winter TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100133163256250418/winter.png) ***Shulker TNT:*** This will cause all near entities to levitate upwards a fatal distance. (Yes, this works for other primed TNT's!) ![Shulker TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100133185226031204/shulker.png) ***Blaze TNT:*** On detonation, this will shoot out four angry Blazes. ![Blaze TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100133214166716547/blaze.png) ***Ender TNT:*** This will teleport all near entities to a random location within 20 blocks. (Yes, this also works for other primed TNT's!) ![Ender TNT](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100133232047030403/ender.png) ***Supernova:*** This will cause a colossal explosion. It has a fuse time of 10 seconds, and is not recommended for lower end computers. ![Supernova](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1100115858627502172/1100133256613081150/supernova.png) --- Looking for a Minecraft Server Host?
